title: Reverse Proxies, Forwarded Fields, Framing, and Request Smuggling Defense · Type Forensics
summary: An incident engineer receives a plausible but broken proxy hop, framing, and parser-consistency contract; preserve the failing exchange, locate the first causal Node or Express boundary, and retain a regression probe. Planned artifact: Repair a changed failure in proxy hop, framing, and parser-consistency contract and publish the reproduction, evidence, repair, and regression record. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence def…
objectives: Strip and regenerate hop-by-hop fields per connection, control Host and authority, handle Connection-nominated fields, and document request and response rewriting.
Require trusted proxies to overwrite client-controlled Forwarded and X-Forwarded values and validate the observed hop count against every reachable topology.
Reject conflicting Content-Length, transfer-coding ambiguity, invalid field syntax, premature EOF, excess body, and front-end or origin disagreement.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

steps.title: Node and Express server Inspect the failure record · Debug Proxy Hop By Hop Fields
steps.instruction:
debug case — A debug team handles case 7707 in a multi-tenant case service with a bounded PostgreSQL pool. Build deterministic TypeScript evidence to reject untrusted topology, ambiguous framing, and insecure parser policy; preserve response ownership after a client abort; then emit a server error and retain one low-cardinality causal trace. Browser code models pure decisions only. Node, Express, listener, TLS, PostgreSQL, proxy, worker, load, and production behavior require explicit authorized transfer gates. Competency probe: Strip and regenerate hop-by-hop fields per connection, control Host and authority, handle Connection-nominated fields, and document request and response rewriting.

Inspect the Proxy Hop By Hop Fields trace for this debug case. Which record connects a precondition, observed state change, and boundary result?

Evidence target: Node and Express server Inspect the failure record · Debug Proxy Hop By Hop Fields.
steps.why: The decision supplies observable evidence for strip and regenerate hop-by-hop fields per connection, control host and authority, handle connection-nominated fields, and document request and response rewriting. For Node and Express server Inspect the failure record · Debug Proxy Hop By Hop Fields, keep Proxy Hop By Hop Fields connected to executable HTTP client decision evidence.

content.title: Evidence defense
content.text: Use the case, one assumption, one observable result, and one limitation. Do not copy the competency statement: Test keep-alive reuse, upgrades, CONNECT, streaming, trailers, retries, draining, malformed requests, and changed proxy topology with wire evidence.

hints: For Node and Express server Publish the incident record · Debug Proxy Drain Upgrade Evidence, name the method, authority, body, byte, time, and credential boundary, Proxy Drain Upgrade Evidence precondition, or invariant that must hold.

At Node and Express server Publish the incident record · Debug Proxy Drain Upgrade Evidence, trace this concrete input and predict resolution, redirect, status, representation, retry, and cleanup evidence before reviewing it: A debug team handles case 2659 in a multi-tenant case service with a bounded PostgreSQL pool. Build deterministic TypeScript evidence to reject untrusted topology, ambiguous framing, and insecure parser policy; preserve response ownership after a client abort; then change the tenant and prove denial before repository access. Browser code models pure decisions only. Node, Express, listener, TLS, PostgreSQL, proxy, worker, load, and production behavior require explicit authorized transfer gates. Competency probe: Test keep-alive reuse, upgrades, CONNECT, streaming, trailers, retries, draining, malformed requests, and changed proxy topology with wire evidence.

For Node and Express server Publish the incident record · Debug Proxy Drain Upgrade Evidence, challenge the documented misconception with request, response, fault, policy, and transfer evidence: One proxied health request proves the full proxy and origin contract.
